/EnableLocalWriteForwardingClusterStack/.data: Cluster DatabaseCluster only has serverless readers and no reader is in promotion tier 0-1.Serverless readers in promotion tiers >= 2 will NOT scale with the writer, which can lead to availability issues if a failover event occurs. It is recommended that at least one reader has `scaleWithWriter` set to true [ack: @aws-cdk/aws-rds:noFailoverServerlessReaders]

Cluster DatabaseClusterPostgresql only has serverless readers and no reader is in promotion tier 0-1.Serverless readers in promotion tiers >= 2 will NOT scale with the writer, which can lead to availability issues if a failover event occurs. It is recommended that at least one reader has `scaleWithWriter` set to true [ack: @aws-cdk/aws-rds:noFailoverServerlessReaders]
